news.t: REX Shares Launches T-REX 2X PAAS (PAAU) & 2X SNDK (SNDU) ETFs

overview.description: The T-REX 2X Long SNDK Daily Target ETF (SNDU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to deliver 200% leveraged exposure to the daily share price movements of SanDisk Corporation (SNDK), net of fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. SNDU was launched on Mar 12, 2026 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: REX Shares Launches T-REX 2X PAAS (PAAU) & 2X SNDK (SNDU) ETFs
